compliance checking and history tracking for all 5 CPs  Core Principles: - CP-1: Complete Quantum Resistance (no ECDSA, RSA, secp256k1, SHA-256, keccak256) - CP-2: Self-Custody (no server key storage) - CP-3: Time Lock Existence (\u226524h normal, \u22657d emergency) - CP-4: Slashing Existence (N\u00b2\u00d710% quadratic formula) - CP-5: Transparency (event emission, no off-chain
